payload.title: November 2022 Crime Report
payload.description: Monthly crime statistics report for the NYCT Subway system, submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau, covering major felonies and hate crime incidents for October 2022 and January-October 2022.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Police Department City of New York; submits monthly crime reports to MTA via its Transit Bureau.
The bureau within NYPD that submits monthly crime reports to MTA regarding major felonies in the NYCT Subway system.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month ending prior to the reporting period.

warnings: entity.parent_entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent entities are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Hate Crime Task Force Transit Bureau HCTF

payload.entity_name: Hate Crime Task Force Transit Bureau
payload.description: Hate Crime Task Force within the NYPD Transit Bureau that tracks hate crime incident statistical data by motivation category.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Hate Crime Task Force Transit Bureau HCTF Statistical Data (As of 10/30/2022)

warnings: entity.parent_entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent entities are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: Recipient of monthly NYPD Transit Bureau crime reports for the NYCT Subway system.

payload.claim_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies including: homicide, robbery, assault, rape in addition to hate crime incidents occurring in the NYCT Subway system. The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month ending prior to the reporting period.

payload.gap_text: FIGURES ARE PRELIMINARY AND SUBJECT TO FURTHER ANALYSIS AND REVISION
payload.description: All crime statistics and enforcement activity figures in this report are marked as preliminary and subject to further analysis and revision.
